title: FY 2020-2021 - 1st Quarter
first_page_excerpt:
ITEM NO. 19
STAFFREPORT
Cm0F OCEANSIDE
DATE:
December 16. 2020
TO:
Honorable Mayor and City Councilmembers
FROM:
Financial Services Department
SUBJECT:
FY 2020-21 FIRST QUARTER FINANCIAL STATUS REPORT
SYNOPSIS
Staff submits the ﬁrst quarter Financial Status Report and recommends that the City
Council accept the report and approve the budget adjustments
BACKGROUND
The City Council adopted the FY 2020-21 budgets on June 3, 2020, with approved
General Fund revenues of $158.03 million and expenditures of $157.7 million. The City
adopted budget for all funds is $485.58 million in revenues and $533.27 million in
expenditures.
The report summarizes the preliminary General Fund major operating funds results as
of September 30, 2020, and is not intended to be inclusive of all transactions. It
